prompt:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: website project cover illustration
Primary request: Create a refined editorial illustration representing the renovation of the JUTH Accident and Emergency Unit in Jos.
Scene/backdrop: a calm modern hospital frontage and emergency entrance in Plateau State, shown as an idealized civic scene rather than a literal photograph.
Subject: upgraded emergency care infrastructure, clean signage, readiness, dignity, and practical delivery.
Style/medium: sophisticated editorial illustration, painted poster realism, not a real documentary photo.
Composition/framing: square composition with a clear focal building, usable margins, and strong foreground-background separation.
Lighting/mood: early morning light, hopeful, disciplined, public-service focused.
Color palette: deep greens, warm neutrals, off-white concrete, restrained red accents.
Constraints: no politicians, no crowds, no logos, no text, no watermark, no ambulance branding, no invented news-photo look.
Avoid: distorted architecture, dramatic disaster imagery, fantasy effects, excessive saturation.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: website project cover illustration
Primary request: Create a refined editorial illustration representing doctors' welfare and medical education support in Plateau State.
Scene/backdrop: a quiet hospital education setting with doctors in discussion near certificates, books, and medical tools, presented symbolically rather than as a real event.
Subject: professional support, mentoring, recognition, and medical advancement.
Style/medium: polished editorial illustration with realistic anatomy and subtle painterly texture.
Composition/framing: square composition, 2 to 3 healthcare professionals, clear depth, minimal clutter.
Lighting/mood: warm indoor daylight, respectful, uplifting, serious.
Color palette: green, ivory, steel blue, muted brick accents.
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no exaggerated smiles, no political rally cues.
Avoid: uncanny faces, chaotic scenes, fake award stages, melodrama.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: website project cover illustration
Primary request: Create a refined editorial illustration representing the Kefiano Creative Hub as a place for youth skills, media, and enterprise learning in Jos.
Scene/backdrop: a contemporary training studio with cameras, laptops, microphones, notebooks, and collaborative worktables.
Subject: young adults learning practical creative and digital skills together.
Style/medium: editorial illustration with grounded realism and clean composition, not a real photograph.
Composition/framing: square composition, a central collaborative table, tools visible but uncluttered.
Lighting/mood: bright natural daylight, energetic, focused, optimistic.
Color palette: warm neutrals, leafy green, charcoal, soft terracotta.
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no futuristic sci-fi elements, no staged campaign imagery.
Avoid: overcrowding, cartoonish proportions, trendy neon aesthetics.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: website project cover illustration
Primary request: Create a refined editorial illustration representing Plateau youth creative and digital skills training.
Scene/backdrop: a workshop environment with photography, writing, design, and digital training stations implied in one cohesive room.
Subject: a cohort of Plateau youths learning and practicing useful skills.
Style/medium: sophisticated editorial illustration, semi-realistic, not a literal event photo.
Composition/framing: square composition with layered activity zones and one strong central focal group.
Lighting/mood: optimistic daylight, active, disciplined, full of possibility.
Color palette: Plateau green, warm cream, natural wood, muted red accents.
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no graduation gowns, no corporate stock-photo feel.
Avoid: fantasy technology, overblown motion, cluttered devices.

Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: website project cover illustration
Primary request: Create a refined editorial illustration representing widows support across three LGAs in Plateau State.
Scene/backdrop: a dignified community distribution moment with food support and orderly household assistance, presented as an editorial illustration rather than a documentary image.
Subject: women receiving practical support in a respectful outdoor civic setting.
Style/medium: human-centered editorial illustration with realism, restraint, and dignity.
Composition/framing: square composition with grouped figures, supplies visible, calm spatial structure.
Lighting/mood: soft daylight, compassionate, organized, hopeful.
Color palette: earth tones, green, cream, muted maroon accents.
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no pity framing, no distress sensationalism.
Avoid: chaotic queues, exaggerated emotion, propaganda poster style.

Use case: illustration-story

Avoid: chaos, exaggerated staging, sentimental cliches.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: website decorative texture
Primary request: Create a subtle premium paper-grain background texture for a civic website inspired by Plateau earth tones.
Scene/backdrop: abstract surface texture only.
Subject: tactile paper grain, slight wash variation, calm handcrafted refinement.
Style/medium: high-resolution textured artwork, minimal, no objects.
Composition/framing: seamless-looking square texture.
Lighting/mood: soft, understated, elegant.
Color palette: warm parchment, pale stone, faint sage undertones.
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no strong directional shadow, no central motif.
Avoid: heavy stains, loud grunge, obvious repeated pattern.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: website decorative background graphic
Primary request: Create a subtle abstract topographic line wash inspired by Plateau landscapes for a refined political website background.
Scene/backdrop: abstract pattern only.
Subject: soft contour lines drifting through a warm neutral field.
Style/medium: elegant graphic artwork with painterly softness.
Composition/framing: square composition, asymmetrical, plenty of quiet space.
Lighting/mood: calm, sophisticated, understated.
Color palette: warm ivory, muted green-gray, pale sandstone.
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no literal map labels, no bold center emblem.
Avoid: loud cartography, technical infographic styling, strong contrast.

Use case: ads-marketing
Asset type: website social share image background
Primary request: Create a polished editorial campaign-style background image for the Kefas Ropshik website social share card.
Scene/backdrop: a refined Plateau civic landscape collage with hints of community, architecture, and opportunity, designed to accept centered text overlay later.
Subject: optimism, public service, youth opportunity, and grounded leadership without depicting a specific event.
Style/medium: elegant editorial illustration, premium, modern, credible.
Composition/framing: wide composition with balanced negative space across the middle for title text.
Lighting/mood: sunrise atmosphere, hopeful, restrained, confident.
Color palette: deep green, cream, sandstone, subtle red accents.
Constraints: no text, no logos, no watermark, no crowd rally, no fake documentary scene.
Avoid: clutter, overly patriotic tropes, harsh contrast.
